description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box of 'Delicias' chocolate-flavored cake mix, branded by Croker. The front features a large, appetizing image of a chocolate cake slice drizzled with chocolate syrup, accompanied by bold, cream-colored and red text. The sides of the box display nutritional information and product details in Spanish, with a repeating heart pattern as the background. The back of the box provides preparation instructions, a recipe for chocolate muffins, and an image of chocolate cupcakes, all set against a red and beige color scheme. The packaging is visually appealing, with clear branding and flavor indication, making it stand out on a store shelf. The box is likely lightweight and designed to be easily handled and stored.
description: A rectangular cardboard box of 'Delicias' chocolate cake mix, featuring vivid images of chocolate desserts and clear branding in red and cream colors.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main branding, a large image of a chocolate cake slice, and prominent product information.
description_view_1: The left side displays the product name, flavor, and detailed nutritional information in a vertical layout.
description_view_2: The back view features preparation instructions, a chocolate muffin recipe, and an image of chocolate cupcakes.
description_view_3: The right side presents additional product details, branding, and more nutritional information, similar in style to the left side.
attribute_brand_logo: The Croker brand logo is visible at the top center of the front face, shaped as a curved banner in orange and white.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front displays 'Sabor chocolate' in a brown banner and features images of chocolate cake and cupcakes, clearly indicating chocolate flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information panels are visible on both side faces, listing calories and other nutrition facts in Spanish.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A red circular graphic on the front says 'Cazuela', and the back features a social media promotion banner with icons and text.
